zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Joan De Monboucher於1330年出生在英國諾廷加姆爾加姆斯頓時，她的父親Sir George Monbourcher26歲，母親Margarett Chaucer23歲。她和Sir Edmund de Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepoint至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1360年在英國諾廷加姆爾霍爾梅 皮朋特享年30歲。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Joan De Monboucher was born in 1330, in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England, her father, Sir George Monbourcher, was 26 and her mother, Margarett Chaucer, was 23. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Sir Edmund de Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepoint. She died in 1360, in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England, at the age of 30.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Joan De Monboucher est née en 1330, à Gamston, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir George Monbourcher, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Margarett Chaucer, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Edmund de Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepoint. Elle est décédée en 1360, à Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 30 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Joan De Monboucher 1330 in Gamston, Nottinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir George Monbourcher 26 und ihre Mutter Margarett Chaucer 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Edmund de Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepoint mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1360 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Holme Pierrepont, Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Joan De Monboucherが1330年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアガムストンで生まれた時，父Sir George Monbourcherは26歳，母Margarett Chaucerは23歳であった。彼女はSir Edmund de Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepointとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1360年にイギリスノッティンガムシュアイアホールメ ピエレプオントで30歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Joan De Monboucher(이)가 1330년 영국 노틴그함실르 갬스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir George Monbourcher(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margarett Chaucer(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Edmund de Pierrepont of Holme Pierrepoint(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1360년 영국 노틴그함실르 홀 피레폰트에서 30세의 나이로 사망했다.
